news:news.news:title: Pope Francis criticized global leaders for prioritizing military spending over humanitarian needs amid escalating violence and political tensions worldwide.
news:news.news:keywords: Pope Francis comments on global conflicts, Turkey school shootings and arrests, Israeli demolitions in Lebanon, South African political sentencing, China's economic performance amid war

news:news.news:title: Europe faces potential flight cancellations due to dwindling jet fuel supplies, while Wall Street reaches record highs amid optimism over the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: energy supply issues in Europe, impact of Iran war on global markets, legal battles in the agricultural sector, US military spending analysis, trends in US labor movement

news:news.news:title: Roku reaches 100 million users while various tech companies face challenges and innovations in age verification, AI tools, and hardware pricing.
news:news.news:keywords: Roku user milestone, age verification challenges, AI design tools updates, hardware price increases, budget laptop processors

news:news.news:title: As the NFL draft approaches, teams are focusing on key prospects, while Tiger Woods faces legal challenges and major sports figures make headlines for various reasons.
news:news.news:keywords: NFL draft prospects and strategies, Tiger Woods legal issues, MLB spending records, NBA player futures, LIV Golf season updates

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into climate change, ancient species, and human health, highlighting both challenges and breakthroughs in various fields.
news:news.news:keywords: ozone layer recovery challenges, factors affecting productivity, ancient species discoveries, methane emissions and climate change, breakthroughs in virus research

news:news.news:title: Diplomatic efforts to prevent war in Iran intensify amid ongoing violence in the region and political tensions in the US.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran ceasefire negotiations, Turkey school shootings, US political tensions, Lebanon military strikes, South Africa diplomatic appointments

news:news.news:title: Wall Street reached a record high amid optimism about the end of the Iran war, while Trump faces scrutiny over military spending and potential trade deal changes.
news:news.news:keywords: US military spending analysis, Wall Street record highs, Trump's influence on the Fed, Live Nation monopoly ruling, US labor movement revival efforts

news:news.news:title: YouTube introduces a feature to disable Shorts, while Ford's EV chief departs and Ticketmaster is found to be an illegal monopoly.
news:news.news:keywords: YouTube Shorts feature update, Ford EV leadership changes, Ticketmaster antitrust ruling, FTC ad agency settlement, Google Gemini AI app launch

news:news.news:title: The NBA play-in games concluded with the Warriors and 76ers advancing, while MLB celebrates Jackie Robinson's legacy amid executive changes in the Players Association.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA play-in game results, Jackie Robinson Day celebrations, LIV Golf season updates, MLB Players Association executive changes, UFC title belt incident

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from ancient fossils to breakthroughs in understanding productivity and potential alien life detection methods.
news:news.news:keywords: productivity research breakthroughs, paleontological discoveries, alien life detection methods, advancements in virology, evolutionary biology insights

news:news.news:title: Wall Street Soars to Record High as Diplomacy Intensifies to Avert Iran Conflict
